title: Jyväskylä, Central Finland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Jyväskylä, Central Finland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Jyväskylä is a city in Central Finland with a population of 143,000. A lively university city between lakes, known for its Alvar Aalto architecture and outdoor sports opportunities.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
